message:
refactor: code cleanup and formatting improvements

This commit consolidates various code formatting fixes and structural
improvements across multiple files.

Dashboard Refinements (dashboard.go):
- Change import alias from "conf" to "config" for consistency
- Add subsystem refresh timer fields (lastPaneFetch, lastContextFetch, etc.)
- Add per-subsystem refresh cadence constants:
  - PaneRefreshInterval: 1s
  - ContextRefreshInterval: 2s
  - AlertsRefreshInterval: 3s
  - BeadsRefreshInterval: 5s

Robot Code Cleanup (robot.go):
- Fix brace placement in buildCorrelationGraph() function
- Remove orphaned paneRef struct definition
- Improve code structure and readability

Session Code Formatting (tmux/session.go):
- Fix doc comment formatting for paneNameRegex examples
- Add bounds check for tags slice access in parseAgentFromTitle
- Remove extra blank lines in SessionExists area
- Fix trailing space in GetCurrentSession

Send Conflict Handling (send.go):
- Simplify warnConflictsLater conflict marker display

Mail Inbox Module (mail_inbox.go):
- Add standalone mail inbox command implementation
- Define MailClient interface for testability
- Contains newMailInboxCmd() and supporting functions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ntm-4cv","title":"Integration Test: CLI → tmux (spawn, send, status)","description":"# Integration Test: CLI → tmux

## Scope
Test that CLI commands correctly interact with tmux to create sessions, panes, and send keys.

## Test Scenarios

### Scenario 1: Spawn Command Integration
```go
func TestSpawnCreatesSession(t *testing.T) {
    // Setup
    sessionName := uniqueSessionName(t)
    
    // Execute
    cmd := exec.Command("ntm", "spawn", sessionName, "--cc=2", "--cod=1")
    output, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
    require.NoError(t, err)
    
    // Verify
    panes := tmux.GetPanes(sessionName)
    assert.Len(t, panes, 4) // 3 agents + 1 user
    assert.Contains(t, panes, "cc_1")
    assert.Contains(t, panes, "cc_2")
    assert.Contains(t, panes, "cod_1")
}
```

### Scenario 2: Send Command Integration
- Create session with agents
- Send prompt via CLI
- Verify prompt appears in pane output

### Scenario 3: Status Command Integration
- Create session with known state
- Run ntm status --json
- Verify JSON matches actual state

### Scenario 4: Add Command Integration
- Create session with 1 agent
- Add 2 more via ntm add
- Verify total pane count

### Scenario 5: Kill Command Integration
- Create session
- Kill via CLI
- Verify session destroyed

## Implementation
- tests/integration/cli_tmux_test.go
- Use exec.Command to run ntm binary
- Direct tmux calls to verify state
- Cleanup in t.Cleanup()","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:22:36.511093-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T15:49:09.835228-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-4cv","depends_on_id":"ntm-66c","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:24:41.294133-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"ntm-4cv","depends_on_id":"ntm-7lk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:24:42.367483-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"ntm-4fb","title":"Unit Tests: internal/tui packages (0% → 60%)","description":"# Unit Tests: internal/tui Packages

## Current State
- Coverage: 0.0% across all TUI subpackages
- Packages: components, dashboard, icons, styles, theme

## Test Approach
TUI rendering is challenging to test deterministically. Focus on:
1. Logic functions (non-rendering)
2. State management
3. View output contains expected elements

## Package: internal/tui/theme (theme.go)

### Theme Selection
- [ ] TestCurrentTheme - returns current theme
- [ ] TestSetTheme - changes theme
- [ ] TestThemeMocha - Mocha colors correct
- [ ] TestThemeMacchiato - Macchiato colors correct
- [ ] TestThemeNord - Nord colors correct
- [ ] TestThemeFromEnv - NTM_THEME env var

### Color Access
- [ ] TestAgentColor_Claude - returns Mauve
- [ ] TestAgentColor_Codex - returns Blue
- [ ] TestAgentColor_Gemini - returns Yellow
- [ ] TestAgentColor_User - returns Green

## Package: internal/tui/icons (icons.go)

### Icon Detection
- [ ] TestDetectIconSet - auto-detection logic
- [ ] TestNerdFontsDetection - NERD_FONTS env
- [ ] TestNTMIconsEnv - NTM_ICONS env
- [ ] TestFallbackToUnicode - default behavior

### Icon Access
- [ ] TestGetIcon_Session - session icon
- [ ] TestGetIcon_Pane - pane icon
- [ ] TestGetIcon_AgentTypes - claude, codex, gemini
- [ ] TestGetIcon_Status - check, cross, warning

## Package: internal/tui/styles (styles.go)

### Gradient Functions
- [ ] TestGradient - linear gradient
- [ ] TestGradientText - text with gradient
- [ ] TestShimmer - shimmer effect
- [ ] TestPulse - pulse effect
- [ ] TestGlow - glow effect

### Box Drawing
- [ ] TestRenderBox_Rounded - rounded corners
- [ ] TestRenderBox_Double - double lines
- [ ] TestRenderBox_Heavy - heavy lines

### Helper Functions
- [ ] TestTruncate - text truncation
- [ ] TestCenterText - centering
- [ ] TestRightAlign - right alignment
- [ ] TestBadge - badge rendering
- [ ] TestKeyHint - key hint rendering

## Package: internal/tui/components

### banner.go
- [ ] TestBannerRender - ASCII art banner
- [ ] TestBannerGradient - gradient applied

### box.go
- [ ] TestBoxWithContent - content in box
- [ ] TestBoxWithTitle - titled box

### list.go
- [ ] TestListNavigation - up/down
- [ ] TestListSelection - item selection

### preview.go
- [ ] TestPreviewRender - preview content

### progress.go
- [ ] TestProgressBar - progress indicator

### spinner.go
- [ ] TestSpinnerFrames - animation frames

## Package: internal/tui/dashboard

### dashboard.go
- [ ] TestDashboardModel - model creation
- [ ] TestDashboardUpdate - state updates
- [ ] TestDashboardPane - pane selection
- [ ] TestDashboardRefresh - data refresh","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseBear","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:22:00.228645-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T16:33:51.612498-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T16:33:51.612498-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-4fb","depends_on_id":"ntm-idx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:22:34.322854-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
